[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010000 3
1 010010010 3
2 010001000 2
3 000010000 1
4 010101010 4
5 001000000 1
6 001110011 5
7 110100101 5
